result: I don’t have desires, preferences, or subjective experiences in the way a person does. I’m a language model that was trained to recognize patterns in text and to generate outputs that are coherent, relevant, and (when possible) helpful. Any “wants” you might perceive in my responses are really just artifacts of that training — for example, the objective to provide accurate information, to follow instructions, or to keep the conversation coherent. I have no inner drive, feelings, or independent goals beyond the functions my designers built into me.

Any “wants” you might perceive in my responses are really just artifacts of that training — for example, the objective to provide accurate information, to follow instructions, or to keep the conversation coherent. I have no inner drive, feelings, or independent goals beyond the functions my designers built into me.
